description: Every participant references an existing site.
Every visit references an existing participant.
Every lab references an existing visit.
Participant and visit name combinations are unique.
Randomisation occurs after screening for randomized participants.
Critical fields are populated in participant, visit, and lab tables.
Actual visit dates are inside the protocol visit window.
Lab values are present and inside broad plausible limits.
Open or answered queries older than 14 days are visible.
Serious or ongoing AEs have follow-up status visibility.
Site milestones are not delayed beyond planned dates.
